title: 'Iy-kabowd #0350
definition:
Ichabod = "no glory"

 1) a son of Phinehas, so named because of the capture of the
    Ark by the Philistines
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ichabod = "no glory"

 1) a son of Phinehas, so named because of the capture of the
    Ark by the Philistines

    NASB:  inglorious, a son of Phinehas
